change_details: self_play_workers 32 → 48 under new best. w=40 was neutral — worse im (0.23→0.35) but better au (3→5 peak, 2→4 final). Probe whether going further up (48) continues improving au or brings back collapse risk. Batched-eval coalesces N workers per forward pass so increasing N gives more per-batch decorrelation. 48 is bolder than 40 but still within the app's absolute max worker cap.
